title: Black Guns and Weapons ModPack
body:
### Black Guns and Weapons ModPack

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/768c7009b814f208cc9bc1f25bf89223f89ffb5c.png)

---

Welcome to the **Black Guns and Weapons ModPack**! This modpack is curated for Minecraft players who enjoy intense gunplay, acrobatics, and a bit of style. Dive into the world of firearms and modern combat with a mix of weapon mods, utilities, and animations to enhance your gameplay.

---

#### Mod List:

1. **ParCool!**  
   Add some flair to your movements with this parkour mod. Perfect for dodging bullets or pulling off stylish maneuvers in combat. Run, jump, climb, and slide your way through any battlefield!

2. **Timeless and Classics Guns**  
   Experience a vast arsenal of guns, ranging from classic to modern firearms. Whether you prefer a vintage rifle or a state-of-the-art machine gun, this mod has something for every gun enthusiast.

3. **Timeless and Classics Guns: LesRaisins Append Pack**  
   Expand your Timeless and Classics Guns collection with this append pack. This add-on introduces even more firearms, enhancing your options and tactical choices on the battlefield.

4. **Mo' Guns**  
   Can’t get enough weapons? Mo' Guns adds even more variety, offering additional weapons for different playstyles. From shotguns to sniper rifles, this mod ensures your armory is never lacking.

5. **Just Enough Items (JEI)**  
   With so many new items and crafting recipes, keeping track can be a challenge. JEI is an essential utility mod that allows you to easily view crafting recipes and items, ensuring you can create and manage your arsenal without hassle.

6. **PuzzlesLib**  
   A crucial library mod required by several mods in this pack. It ensures everything runs smoothly by providing essential code and functionalities.

7. **Better Animations Collection**  
   Enhance your visual experience with better animations! This mod adds more realistic and fluid animations, making your combat experiences more immersive.

8. **Simple Night Vision Goggles**  
   Darkness won’t be an issue with these night vision goggles. Perfect for nighttime raids or exploring dark areas, these goggles give you a tactical advantage by allowing you to see in the dark.

9. **Obfuscate**  
   A library mod that provides the required framework for other mods, especially those that involve complex animations or interactions. It is a must-have to keep everything functioning seamlessly.

10. **MrCrayfish’s Gun Mod (cgm)**  
    Another fantastic mod that introduces a range of customizable guns. You can modify your weapons with attachments, making each firearm suit your exact needs.

---

#### Tips and Tricks:

- **Practice Makes Perfect:** With so many guns available, spend some time in a safe area to get familiar with their recoil, firing rate, and reload times.

- **Mobility is Key:** Use the ParCool! mod to stay on the move. Combine your parkour skills with your shooting to outmaneuver enemies.

- **Keep an Eye on Ammo:** Always keep an eye on your ammo count and crafting materials. Use JEI to help you craft more ammo and attachments on the fly.

- **Explore Weapon Mods:** Experiment with different weapon mods in MrCrayfish’s Gun Mod to find the perfect setup for your playstyle.

---
